title: sampacca oblonga
intro: Sampacca oblonga, also known as the Elateria or Saraca, is a tropical plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sampacca oblonga is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
